_doc: CALIBRATED factors for the CPU instruction-count roofline (m4_cpu.py), fit to fp32 cpu_ops.json on a single A76 core. eta_c calibrated; eta_bw=ASSUMPTION (no BW-resolved op in fp32 decode data); overhead_op per op. fp16 = emulated upper bound (not fit).
eta_bw_tag: assumption (no CPU mem-BW micro-benchmark; literature-typical cache efficiency)
calibration_basis: single A76 core, single-thread, numpy fp32 (measurements/aetina/cpu_ops.json)
